author_identification.canonical_name_ar: إبراهيم بن محمد بن أحمد المناديلي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Hadith narrator and transmitter from Basra, known for his collection of hadith

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A collection of hadith transmissions from the author's teachers, typical of the hadith compilation tradition
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of the broader hadith literature, preserving transmissions from the 5th/6th century AH
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: نبيل سعد الدين جرَّار is a known hadith scholar and editor with several publications in the field
